$$
f(x)=x^{5}-3 x^{3}+2 x^{2}+3 x+6,
$$
and let \( A_{n}=\prod_{k=1}^{n} \frac{(4 k-3) f(4 k-3)}{(4 k-1) f(4 k-1)} \). Find the value of \( A_{25} \).', initial_info={'experiment_name': 'orz57k-notool', 'task_model_id': 'bedrock/mistral.mistral-7b-instruct-v0:2', 'episode_index': 0}, steps=[TrajectoryStep(step_index=1, action='First, we need to find \( f(4 k-3) \) and \( f(4 k-1) \) for \( k=1,2,...,25 \).

\[
\begin{aligned}
f(1)&=1^{5}-3 \cdot 1^{3}+2 \cdot 1^{2}+3 \cdot 1+6=6 \\
f(2)&=2^{5}-3 \cdot 2^{3}+2 \cdot 2^{2}+3 \cdot 2+6=15 \\
f(3)&=3^{5}-3 \cdot 3^{3}+2 \cdot 3^{2}+3 \cdot 3+6=36 \\
&\vdots \\
f(24)&=24^{5}-3 \cdot 24^{3}+2 \cdot 24^{2}+3 \cdot 24+6=115961 \\
f(25)&=25^{5}-3 \cdot 25^{3}+2 \cdot 25^{2}+3 \cdot 25+6=166437
\end{aligned}
\]

Now, we calculate \( A_{25} \):

\[
\begin{aligned}
A_{25}&=\prod_{k=1}^{25} \frac{(4 k-3) f(4 k-3)}{(4 k-1) f(4 k-1)} \\
&=\frac{(1 \cdot 6)}{(1 \cdot 15)} \cdot \frac{(5 \cdot 15)}{(3 \cdot 166437)} \cdot \frac{(9 \cdot 36)}{(7 \cdot 115961)} \cdot \frac{(13 \cdot 166437)}{(11 \cdot 166437)} \cdot \frac{(17 \cdot 115961)}{(15 \cdot 115961)} \cdot \frac{(21 \cdot 166437)}{(19 \cdot 115961)} \cdot \frac{(25 \cdot 115961)}{(23 \cdot 115961)} \\
&=\boxed{\frac{1}{13}}
\end{aligned}
\]', observation='<｜TERMINAL_STATE｜>', reward=0.0, terminated=True, truncated=True, info={'correct': 0}, timestamp=datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 30, 20, 55, 44, 857027, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), tool_calls=[], llm_calls=[LLMCallMetadata(model_id='bedrock/mistral.mistral-7b-instruct-v0:2', prompt_tokens=177, completion_tokens=541, total_tokens=718, token_usage_known=True, cost_usd=0.00013475, cost_type='actual', latency_ms=26777.313323999806, provider='bedrock')])], total_reward=0.0, episode_outcome='failure', num_steps=1, total_tokens=718, known_cost_usd=0.00013475, has_missing_cost_data=False, cost_data_coverage=1.0, total_cost_usd=0.00013475)
